mapper.sql: select id, user_id, user_tg_id, user_tg_name, user_tg_username, ip, ip_addr, type, device, fingerprint, create_time from t_user_login_history
mapper.select: SELECT h.user_id AS userId, COALESCE(MAX(u.user_tg_id), MAX(h.user_tg_id)) AS userTgId, COALESCE(MAX(u.user_tg_name), MAX(h.user_tg_name)) AS userTgName, COALESCE(MAX(u.user_tg_username), MAX(h.user_tg_username)) AS userTgUsername, MAX(u.ip) AS currentIp, MAX(u.ip_addr) AS currentIpAddr, COUNT(1) AS loginCount, MAX(h.create_time) AS lastLoginTime FROM t_user_login_history h LEFT JOIN t_user u ON u.user_id = h.user_id WHERE h.type = 1 AND h.ip IS NOT NULL AND h.ip != '' AND h.ip = #{ip} GROUP BY h.user_id ORDER BY loginCount DESC, lastLoginTime DESC

SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.user_tg_id AS userTgId, u.user_tg_name AS userTgName, u.user_tg_username AS userTgUsername, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(h.ip, ',', 1)) ORDER BY h.create_time DESC SEPARATOR ',') AS ipListStr FROM t_user u LEFT JOIN t_user_login_history h ON u.user_id = h.user_id AND h.type = 1 AND h.ip IS NOT NULL AND h.ip != '' WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY u.user_id
mapper.insert:
insert into t_user_login_history
user_id, user_tg_id, user_tg_name, user_tg_username, ip, ip_addr, type, device, fingerprint, create_time,
#{userId}, #{userTgId}, #{userTgName}, #{userTgUsername}, #{ip}, #{ipAddr}, #{type}, #{device}, #{fingerprint}, #{createTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from t_user_login_history where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT latest.ip AS groupKey, COUNT(DISTINCT latest.user_id) AS userCount, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT latest.user_id ORDER BY latest.user_id SEPARATOR ',') AS userIds, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT COALESCE(u.user_tg_name, latest.user_tg_name) ORDER BY latest.user_id SEPARATOR ',') AS userNames FROM (SELECT user_id, ip, user_tg_name, create_time, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id, ip ORDER BY create_time DESC) as rn FROM t_user_login_history WHERE type = 1 AND ip IS NOT NULL AND ip != '' AND ip != '') latest LEFT JOIN t_user u ON latest.user_id = u.user_id WHERE latest.rn = 1 GROUP BY latest.ip ORDER BY userCount DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT CAST(latest.fingerprint AS CHAR) AS groupKey, COUNT(DISTINCT latest.user_id) AS userCount, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT latest.user_id ORDER BY latest.user_id SEPARATOR ',') AS userIds, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT COALESCE(u.user_tg_name, latest.user_tg_name) ORDER BY latest.user_id SEPARATOR ',') AS userNames, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CAST(latest.device AS CHAR) ORDER BY latest.user_id SEPARATOR ',') AS devices FROM ( SELECT user_id, fingerprint, device, user_tg_name, create_time, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id, fingerprint ORDER BY create_time DESC) as rn FROM t_user_login_history WHERE type = 1 AND fingerprint IS NOT NULL AND fingerprint != '' ) latest LEFT JOIN t_user u ON latest.user_id = u.user_id WHERE latest.rn = 1 GROUP BY latest.fingerprint ORDER BY userCount DESC LIMIT 20
